workflows.name: Select a search result from dropdown
Search clients
workflows.on_success: filters client list by search query (Name, Account No., External ID, or Mobile Number)

workflows.name: Filter clients by Status
workflows.on_success: filters client list by selected status

workflows.name: Open Client Detail from listing
workflows.on_success: navigates to Client Detail page for selected client

workflows.name: Download import result from Import History
workflows.on_success: downloads import results for the selected import entry

workflows.name: Create new loan for client (Active)
workflows.on_success: initiates new loan flow for client

workflows.name: Create new savings for client (Active)
workflows.on_success: initiates new savings flow for client

workflows.name: Create new share account for client (Active)
workflows.on_success: initiates new share account flow for client

workflows.name: Navigate to Bulk Import Groups page
workflows.on_success: navigates to Bulk Import Groups page

workflows.name: Upload groups file
workflows.on_success: imports groups and records import history

Generate Collection Sheet
workflows.on_success: opens collection sheet for batch entry

workflows.on_success: Name column is a clickable link that opens the center detail

workflows.name: Download import template on Bulk Import Centers
Import centers via Bulk Import Centers
Activate center from Center Detail actions
Edit center from Center Detail actions
workflows.on_success: opens edit form for the center

workflows.name: Close center from Center Detail actions
Assign staff from Center Detail actions
Open a Group from Member Groups table in Groups tab
Open loan product detail from table
Enter edit mode from loan product detail
workflows.on_success: enables edit mode for loan product

workflows.name: Add a predefined charge in Charges step
workflows.on_success: adds selected predefined charge to Selected_Charges

workflows.name: Remove a selected charge from Selected_Charges
Open product detail from table (Product Name link)
Create Share Product — Accounting Method == None (GL fields hidden)
Create Share Product — Accounting Method == Cash-based (GL fields visible)
Create Charge — Charge_Applies_To = Client or Shares
Open Charge detail by clicking Name column
Open Charge detail via row action
Open Edit form from Charge detail
Edit Charge — Charge_Applies_To = Client or Shares
View Floating Rate Details
workflows.on_success: navigates to Floating Rate detail view

workflows.name: Create Floating Rate (submit)
workflows.on_success: creates floating rate; linked loan products' interest rates adjust automatically based on applicable rate period

workflows.name: Edit Floating Rate (submit)
workflows.on_success: updates floating rate; linked loan products' interest rates adjust automatically based on applicable rate period

workflows.name: Open delinquency range detail from Ranges table
Open delinquency bucket detail from Buckets table
Create a delinquency bucket (with one or more ranges)
workflows.on_success: creates delinquency bucket; when a linked loan becomes overdue the system automatically classifies it into the appropriate range based on days past due for portfolio-at-risk reporting, provisioning calculations, and collection workflow triggers

workflows.name: Open Client Detail via Client Name link
Start a new loan application (open wizard)
Submit new loan application (wizard)
workflows.on_success: creates loan in Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Add Charge row in Charges step
Approve loan application (Submitted and Pending Approval)
Reject loan application (Submitted and Pending Approval)
Withdraw loan application (Submitted and Pending Approval)
Delete loan application (Submitted and Pending Approval)
Disburse approved loan (Approved)
workflows.on_success: disburses loan; if Disburse_to_Savings is selected, deposits into client's linked savings account; changes status to Active on successful disbursement

workflows.name: Undo approval (Approved)
workflows.on_success: reverts approval; returns status to Submitted and Pending Approval

workflows.name: Make repayment (Active)
workflows.on_success: if repayment is full settlement, full settlement changes status to 'Closed obligations met'

workflows.name: Waive interest (Active)
workflows.on_success: processes interest waiver for the loan

workflows.name: Write off loan (Active)
workflows.on_success: processes write off for the loan

workflows.name: Reschedule loan (Active)
workflows.on_success: creates a pending reschedule request requiring separate approval

workflows.name: Foreclosure action (Active)
workflows.on_success: processes foreclosure action on the loan

workflows.name: Charge off loan (Active)
workflows.on_success: processes charge off for the loan

workflows.name: Assign Loan Officer (Active)
workflows.on_success: assigns the selected loan officer to the loan

workflows.name: Create savings account — Submit
workflows.on_success: creates account in Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Undo approval (Approved)
workflows.on_success: reverts to Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Block debit (Active)
workflows.on_success: blocks debit transactions on the account

workflows.name: Block credit (Active)
workflows.on_success: blocks credit transactions on the account

workflows.name: Submit Share Account Application
workflows.on_success: creates account in Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Undo Approval
workflows.on_success: reverts status to Submitted and Pending Approval

workflows.name: Redeem Shares (Active Account)
workflows.on_success: credits calculated redemption amount to selected savings account

workflows.name: Open Fixed Deposit Account Creation Form
Open Recurring Deposit Account Creation Form
Premature Close Fixed Deposit Account
workflows.on_success: prematurely closes the Fixed Deposit account

workflows.name: Close on Maturity Fixed Deposit Account
workflows.on_success: closes the Fixed Deposit account on maturity

workflows.name: Deposit to Recurring Deposit Account
workflows.on_success: records a deposit to the Recurring Deposit account

workflows.name: Premature Close Recurring Deposit Account
workflows.on_success: prematurely closes the Recurring Deposit account

workflows.name: Close on Maturity Recurring Deposit Account
workflows.on_success: closes the Recurring Deposit account on maturity

workflows.name: Open Edit GL Account from detail view (Edit)
Create Closure — submit form
workflows.on_success: creates closure and prevents journal entries from being posted for dates on or before the closing date

workflows.name: Create Financial Activity Mapping
workflows.on_success: creates mapping and enables system to automatically post accounting entries for the mapped financial activity

workflows.name: Open Create Criteria form from Criteria table
Open existing Criteria via Criteria Name link
workflows.on_success: opens Provisioning_Criteria_Form for the selected criteria

workflows.name: Generate provisioning entries (create journal entries)
workflows.on_success: generates provisioning journal entries by calculating required provision amount for each loan category and creating corresponding journal entries based on current loan portfolio and configured criteria

workflows.name: Review provisioning entry
workflows.on_success: opens entry detail showing detailed breakdown by loan product and category

workflows.name: Recreate provisioning entry
workflows.on_success: recreates provisioning entry based on current loan portfolio and configured criteria

workflows.name: Open Office Detail page via Office_Name link
Open Edit Office form from Detail page
Create employee — submit creation form
workflows.on_success: creates employee; if Is Loan Officer is true, staff is included in the Loan Officer dropdown for loan creation and can be assigned to clients, groups, and centers

workflows.name: Edit employee — submit edit form
workflows.on_success: updates employee; if Is Loan Officer is true, staff is included in the Loan Officer dropdown for loan creation and can be assigned to clients, groups, and centers

workflows.name: View staff detail — click Name in employees table
Open Edit from staff detail — use Edit action

workflows.on_success: adds cash from vault to cashier

workflows.name: Settle Cash from Cashier (from Cashier Detail)
workflows.on_success: returns cash from cashier to vault
